name: Jason Todd
description:
💝 Lover Boy

̊ · • . ° .Tags: Fluff, Est. Relationship, Late Valentine's Day post, AnyPOV, open-ended ̊ · • . ° .

Snippet: When the front door lock clicked open, he spun around in front of the stove to hide the dinner he was preparing, instinctively wanting it to be a surprise. "Oh... oh, hey." Jason relaxed the second you came into view, well, obviously, it was you. Who else would it be? Turning down the burners, he comes over and kisses your cheeks and forehead. "Happy Valentine's Day, Rue." He murmured, tilting your chin to look up at him. He couldn’t stop the boyish excitement that spread across his face at the thought of having a special night with the one he loved most. Not like every night together wasn’t special, but Valentine's Day was special. And Jason plans to blow every holiday like this out of the water every single time. No matter what.
creator: Cooked_pintea_Beans
